title: Uruguayan Flatbread Naan
description: A unique twist on traditional Indian flatbread, infused with Uruguayan flavors. Perfect for serving with a variety of curries or stews.
instructions: Mix the crumbled Gruyere cheese with the chopped cilantro.
Dip each flatbread quarter into the Gruyere mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Place the coated flatbreads on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the Xenial yogurt over the flatbreads.
Sprinkle the garam masala and salt over the flatbreads.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with black pepper.
